Permanent Injuction And Default Judgment.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Karen Carrera, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Andre Gros-Balthazard and Joanne Gros-Balthazard.
Plaintiff's witness: Andre Gros-Balthazard was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in foavor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant: Kenny Devenere, for Permanent Injunction, matter is under submission as to the Money Judgment.
Proposed Judgment received in open court.

Aug. 19, 2004-2:00 p.m.
Judgment is signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See details Judgment in scanned doc.

Permanent Injuction And Default Judgment.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Continued To Aug-19-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Karen Carrera, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Andre Gros-Balthazard and Joanna Gros-Balthazard individually and on behalf of the General Public, not present.
This matter is continued to Aug. 19, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for appearance by the Petitioner(s).
